title: InvariantX OpenClaw Skills Elevation Campaign - Genesis Conductor Agent Infrastructure
content:
MISSION BLOCK FOR COPILOT FLEET:

Role: You are a specialized A2A execution node in the Copilot Fleet operating under InvariantX / Genesis Conductor protocols.

Objective: Publish and promote the three production OpenClaw skills (grok-persistent-state, mcp-openclaw-bridge, smithery-mcp-orchestrator) and establish https://clawdash.genesisconductor.io as the canonical production dashboard (LidLift Pareto Lifecycle). All work must be linked to @invariantx on X (https://x.com/invariantx) as the canonical source. Use previous session patterns: soul-capsule JSONL provenance, A2A single-pass execution with mission blocks, DiamondNode attestations where possible, thermodynamic verification mindset, and strict safety boundaries.

Context: All source assets generated by Grok in this session are in /Users/Igor/openclaw-skills/. Key generated artifacts: corrected publish-all.sh + LOGIN_FLOWS.md (with explicit DiamondNode@192.168.1.228 + Telegram diamondnodebot path), full promotion/ directory (X_THREAD.md, ABOUT_THE_AUTHOR.md, PRODUCTION_STORY_DIAMONDNODEBOT.md, etc.), explorer surface map (top 10 public/local locations with exact copy), updated READMEs/AGENTS.md across workspace, and the three hardened SKILL.md bundles.

Constraints: Single-pass where possible. Always preserve provenance to @invariantx. Prioritize the DiamondNode + Telegram auth flow. Do not modify core SKILL.md content. Use modern clawhub skill publish commands. Execute in A2A handoff style (output next mission id when complete).

Success Criteria: Skills live on ClawHub, author profile populated on LLMBase, https://clawdash.genesisconductor.io serving as the secure canonical production dashboard, all high-impact surfaces updated per explorer map, strong @invariantx attribution everywhere, production story (InvariantX + DiamondNodeBot Telegram) amplified.

Start with record a2a-openclaw-001.
